subject: Accounting
title: Cloud Bookkeeping Software
description: A micro-lesson that makes Cloud Bookkeeping Software usable.

hook.text: QuickBooks, Xero, FreshBooks—cloud tools have replaced paper ledgers for millions of businesses.

buildup.text: Cloud software automates journal entries, bank feeds, invoicing, and financial reporting.

discovery.text: Bank transactions import automatically and are matched to invoices—saving hours of manual work.

twist.text: Automation reduces errors but doesn't eliminate them. Someone still needs to review and classify.

climax.text: Cloud bookkeeping gives real-time financial visibility from anywhere—phone, tablet, or laptop.

punchline.text: The ledger moved to the cloud. The principles stayed on the ground.

quiz.question: What advantage does cloud bookkeeping software offer?
options: It only works for large corporations
